description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a clean, geometric design and a flat roof on the main structure, complemented by a gable-roofed garage wing. The facade features large, vertically oriented windows and a prominent central entryway with glass double doors. The house is surrounded by a low hedge and paved walkways, with landscaped garden beds and a driveway leading to the garage. The rear of the house includes a spacious patio area and additional garden space, while the side elevations are more solid with fewer windows. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete, with dark-framed windows and doors. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing straight lines and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and a gable-roofed garage, surrounded by hedges and paved walkways. The design is sleek, minimalist, and emphasizes geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and attached gable-roofed garage.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows and the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a clear look at the garage, driveway, and landscaped garden beds.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the garage, garden area, and the solid rear wall of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass double doors with a paved approach, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements
